concerns.detail: Deletion of entire entry regarding Princeton professor Mengdi Wang including substantive criticism about hiring practices (夫妻店) and intern management, suggesting suppression of legitimate observations rather than cleanup.
concerns.excerpt:
Princeton Mengdi Wang
招非常多intern，夫妻店
单纯好奇 mengdi老公是谁（congle)
合作过，相处下来我觉得王老师人非常好，只是真的很忙

concerns.detail: Inserted unsupported personal insult targeting another commenter by modifying their identifier to include '你也太纯了' (you're too naive/pure), which is a character judgment unrelated to advising practices.
concerns.excerpt: 纯路人吃瓜（纯路人上来就是立场 你也太纯了）：

concerns.detail: Deletion of claim regarding inappropriate relationship between advisor and PhD student (曾和phd导师搞暧昧), potentially suppressing observation of advisor misconduct.
